title: Armory Addons
description: Just adds some things that I felt like should be in the game and I hope you like it!
body:
This mod is just something I have been working on for a while and I think it is really good and want to share it with all of you guys!!! This mod is really cool because it adds a whole bunch of stuff that ehances combat in Minecraft. (More to come eventually!) If you want something added to the mod, please email me at (icyphantomassisting@gmail.com). Thank you for downloading and I hope to add a lot more soon!

This mod adds a few things:

The Wither Sword

The End Sword

Glass tools & Armor

Nether Staff

End Staff

Greatsword

Poison Sword

Teleportation Staff

Effects Armor Set (1.1.0+)

Wither-Enhanced Greatsword (1.1.0+)

(By The Way, the X's are for visibility so you can see the glass stuff too!)

Wither Sword: Does a bunch of damage and gives the wither effect to what you hit
Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efc673a66b75c7ed018c6c0fefa537bdae057b28_0.webp)

The End Sword: Gives levitation and prevents fall damage, also does a ton of damage, also give an effect called End Decay, making the thing take damage really fast.
Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6c0fa80e97aac5be6d05124892287f0b65d28b4.jpeg)

Glass Stuff: All of it is slightly better than stone and chainmail. The sword applies bleeding (does a bunch of damage really fast) and at least me and my friend think is super cool.

Glass Sword:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/522d7c9ff10d130f85ccf96012f5740824d48081.jpeg)

Glass Pickaxe/Axe/Hoe/Shovel:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52b6d943576b6cd2c000692f22a74787c40cf5b3.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10dc0bbb234dfbd4a097966077457d4bb68c716e.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2467ab7110d4072a2c3288dd9c948d6a7dc74b10.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f816bd81affe7f1eeebb8034d07c6b1a389cb85c.jpeg)

Glass Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings/Boots:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08dd421a78021455f14634a5d5b305c0b62a0d2.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b734c7aa7b0efe6aed821e2babb54b68c0c9e6f0.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74928151d2cdaf8309c6da3deb7a3dc91d952b66.jpeg)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d357a0e8004a65b52d5ed1bec12936d113df4b.jpeg)

Nether Staff: Shoots Fire Charges and they make big explosion! (This is my personal favorite of the mod!) Pretty Simple!

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12ea9e58da0cc124ae75fabb91ee140a0dff20d.jpeg)

End Staff: Like the Nether Staff but it has unlimited ammo and a WAY longer cooldown. Also Pretty Simple!

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08fec00622e29d612c4d106cc39eaf77abbbc21c.jpeg)

Greatsword: When you hit something with it, it gives it slowness and does a LOT of damage, pretty slow though...

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38d49a268541ab1a6e9d4a7e6b284ffcfabf01ce.jpeg)

Poison Sword: It's a sword that give poison, what is more to say about it? It's pretty self explanitory.

Crafting:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee0bc8b5268d57f52d2996e206e1450f0146e8fa.jpeg)
(The Weird Blob thing is a Fermented Spider Eye)

Teleportation Staff: Shoots Ender Pearls a lot farther so you can travel long distances.

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e93909ecb89967ba535b69c4cb3c2967547424e.jpeg)

(ANYTHING PAST THIS LINE IS 1.1.0+)

Effect Armor Set: 
Helmet of The Turtle Master: Gives you water breathing and night vision, so water exploration is no longer a problem.

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09b1b2a2778ff587150a987331a27267468da56d.jpeg)

Chestplate of Protection: Gives you protection and it's pretty protective and stronger than netherite.

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e39c7573b88bb57ac812497c3b04a0f25d4fa8d8.jpeg)
    (The red things are Redstone Blocks)

Leggings of The Rabbit: Gives you jump boost and prevents you from taking fall damage from 10 blocks.

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38c45d2480106c856a4a9579a4292e9476a965fb.jpeg)
   (The Light Brown things are Rabbit's Feet by the way...)

Boots of Speed: Gives you speed and makes you fast, what more to explain?

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47f511d09158ffc691cda4d0a604bf22f1f5002c.jpeg)
   (The red things are Redstone Blocks)

Wither-Enhanced Greatsword: It's a stronger Greatsword, and gives the same stuff as the Wither Sword, and it's slower than the Greatsword, but much stronger.

Crafted:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ef4f6bcf2ddf7cf6fea8416964250b81046637.jpeg)
